MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PHILIP KEITH FOR PLAINTIFF TRITERRA REALTY GROUP. AGENT RIYAD SALMA ALSO PRESENT
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY TIMOTHY SHANNON FOR DEFENDANT CLAEB NESSLAAC

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 32 ELLERT STREET. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT A STAY OF EXECUTION TO 12/15/05. IF KEYS DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY AT 44 MONTGOMERY STREET (415.433.1790) BY 12/15/06 PLAINTIFF TO PAY $2000 TO THIRD PARTY. PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN MONEY JUDGMENT AND $2000 WILL NOT BE PAID TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT MAY PREPARE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:TOM MAXWELL ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:RITA HOWELL (218)
